scripts.build:all: npm run build --workspace=packages/core && npm run build --workspace=packages/opencode-plugin && npm run build --workspace=packages/pi-extension && npm run build --workspace=packages/pi-sdk
scripts.test:all: npm test && npm test --workspace=packages/core && npm test --workspace=packages/opencode-plugin && npm test --workspace=packages/pi-extension && npm test --workspace=packages/pi-sdk
